reddit.name: reddit
reddit.detail: RETIRED 2026-07-20. Reddit blocks unauthenticated JSON: old.reddit.com 403 and www.reddit.com 403, tested live with a browser User-Agent. No REDDIT_CLIENT_ID exists anywhere in the repo, so no request this system can make will succeed. The endpoint fix in 9bc2849 (old.reddit + raw_json=1) was correct code against a door that is shut. Reviving this source requires a registered OAuth app and oauth.reddit.com — not a code change here.

value.regime_read: NQ weak vs ES — rotation OUT of tech. A breadth/rotation warning; tech-led longs are suspect.
value.narrative:
Macro backdrop —
[2026-07-20] US economic state (FRED):
  Growth: real GDP 2.1% (q/q ann)
  Inflation: CPI 3.23% YoY | core CPI 2.25% | core PCE 2.89% (Fed target 2%)
  Labor: unemployment 4.2%
  Rates: fed funds 3.63% | 10Y n/a | 10Y-2Y 0.37% (NORMAL)
  Consumer: UMich sentiment 44.8 | VIX 16.73

---
PRE-US-OPEN BRIEFING — ES/NQ (research only; no execution path, CME futures vs OANDA forex-only). Scorecard caveat up front: n=14 dir-calls, hit 0.786 but regime accuracy only 0.281 — this is CALIBRATING, not a proven edge. Treat everything below as intelligence, not signal.

1) RECENT MOVE-BY-MOVE READ. Both indices are green on the day (ES +0.36%, NQ +0.78%) but red on the week (ES -0.51%, NQ -1.62%). The larger weekly bleed in NQ vs ES is the story: tech gave back more over the 5-day window and is only now bouncing intraday. NQ trades at 28,997 — below its prior-week high (30,062) by a meaningful margin and well off the 5-day price-range top (30,047), while ES at 7,524 sits closer to its own recent structure. The daily bounce is likely a relief move off the prior-day lows (NQ 28,408 / ES 7,473) rather than fresh trend. Catalyst backdrop is dominated by GEOPOLITICS — escalating US–Iran tensions (missile attack on US troops in Jordan, missiles toward Eilat, Trump pushing Iran into the Russia sanctions bill). That is a risk-off / headline-shock overhang, not a tech-bullish tape. The remaining AI_CAPEX headline is skeptical in tone ('same old song and dance'). Nothing here is a clean bullish tech catalyst; the intraday green looks like mean-reversion into a heavy news environment.

2) VOLUME-PROFILE READ (WHERE volume traded — volume-at-price, NOT order-flow delta; true buy/sell aggression needs a CME feed). ES: POC 7,603.85, value area 7,499–7,619. Price at 7,524 is in the LOWER third of value, sitting on session VWAP (7,520.76) with the VAL (7,499) as the line in the sand below. The heavy node cluster sits ABOVE (7,585–7,615) — price is trading below the accumulation shelf, which is a modest headwind. NQ: POC 29,627, value area 28,707–29,707. Price at 28,997 is near the LOWER edge of its value area, above VAL 28,707 but a full ~630 points below POC. High-volume nodes bracket both sides (28,787–28,827 support cluster below, 29,467–29,707 above). Line in the sand for NQ = value-area low 28,707; losing it opens the 28,408 prior-day/week low. NQ is 'heavy' — trading low in its distribution with most volume overhead.

3) NQ/ES LEAD-LAG REGIME: ROTATION_WARN. Contemporaneous correlation is high (0.908) so the pair still moves together, but the return spread is negative (20d avg -0.215%, cumulative -4.3%) — NQ is persistently underperforming ES. Best lead-lag corr is a weak 0.085 at lag 2 with leader = NONE, i.e. no clean directional leader to trade off of. The read is rotation OUT of tech: tech-led longs are suspect. Implication: SIZE DOWN and do NOT trust NQ-led breakouts. If anything, relative structure favors ES over NQ, but the absolute bias is not clean enough to lean hard either way. This regime input lowers confidence in any long-the-bounce idea.

4) EVENT-CALENDAR AWARENESS. FOMC in 9 days (2026-07-29) — begin reducing size / widening stops as we approach. PCE in ~11 days (approx cadence estimate, 8:30 ET). ISM Manufacturing ~14 days, NFP ~18 days. Nothing in the immediate pre-open window forces a defensive posture on the calendar alone, but the FOMC blackout drift plus live geopolitical tail risk argues for smaller size than normal. Calendar dates for PCE/ISM/NFP are cadence ESTIMATES, not verified — don't anchor to them.

5) SYNTHESIS — META-REGIME + NARROWED BIAS. Meta-regime: a tech-heavy ROTATION_WARN tape (NQ weak vs ES, price low in NQ's volume distribution) layered on top of a GEOPOLITICAL risk-off overhang and an approaching FOMC. The signals are MIXED: intraday momentum is up, but relative strength, volume positioning, and news all cut the other way. That mix demands LOW confidence. Bias: NEUTRAL, ~38% — no clean edge in either direction. The tactical lean, if forced: fade NQ strength into the 29,467–29,627 overhead node cluster rather than chase; respect VAL support at 28,707. Bullish invalidation for any bounce thesis is a break and hold below NQ 28,706 (value-area low) — below that, 28,408 is the next magnet and the rotation-out-of-tech read gains conviction. Confidence is deliberately capped because news is headline-driven/uncertain and the lead-lag shows no leader. This is intelligence, not a validated edge — regime accuracy on my own scorecard is still poor (0.281).
